subcodes.first_line: A remembrance issued from the Presence of the Oppressed, to the one who confessed the Oneness of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم الی الذی اقر بوحدانیه الله و فردانیته و بانه هو الاول و الآخر
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @exhortations and counsels, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
